# Known-failing tests in PuLP 3.3.2's COIN_CMDTest suite, and why.
# See README.md's "Known shortcomings" section for full explanations.
# Format: ClassName::test_name, one per line.

# Expects exact variable values on a degenerate infeasible LP that depend on
# CBC's own internal pivoting tie-breaks, not on correctness of the status.
COIN_CMDTest::test_infeasible

# Expects a feasible incumbent for a ~16,500-variable bin-packing instance
# within 10s; needs a primal heuristic (rounding/diving) we don't have.
COIN_CMDTest::test_measuring_solving_time
